My United States Travel Map

Author

Daniel Jang

Published

2026-06-30

This is still a work in progress. As I add new visualizations, some other things may be broken, so please excuse the state of this html file. This also serves as an exercise in data visualization.

Which states have I been to in my lifetime (both lived and travelled)?

My definition of “lived in a state” is if I spent at least 31 consecutive days in the same semi-permanent lodging, enough to develop a routine. For travelling, I do not count passing by a state in some form of transportation, but I do count some destination, even if it was unintentional. For example, I originally had a layover in Phoenix, Arizona, but I ended up staying the night.

As a bonus, I will denote states whose capital city I have visited with a solid line.

Step Visualization of first visit (since 2018)

Of course I did not visit these states at the same time, so I wanted to see when I visited each state for the first time. From this point on, I only use data after 2018 since I do not have accurate data prior to this time.

Visits (days) and living each year (since 2018)

As an exercise in small multiple visualizations, I have here a map from each year highlighting how long I stayed in each state I visited each year (by number of days). I also added a border highlight for any state that I lived in during that time.

When did I visit each state?

This is kind of obselete and not that interesting in my opinion, so I may get rid of it.

Wordcloud of Travel Descriptions!

Turns out I am not that creative in my writing.

Descriptive Statistics

Things that I am planning to include:

  1. how many redeyes?
  2. how many business vs leisure trips?
  3. distribution of days I stayed (faceted by something)?
  4. average length of trip by days?
  5. number of day trips?
  6. average distance of trips?
  7. I also may change the fourth visualization into a chart instead, with states ordered by when they joined the union.
  8. Also something with cities (geographic coordinates? I wonder if there’s a public data set to do this with… I’m confident there is)

The following are visuals I am unsure if I should make.

  1. Lines of travel (How have I travelled between each state?): May not work if I don’t have proper coordinates. Maybe I can do it based on thickness? I am unconvinced of this one If I can combine this with city data, then that would be really cool, but that sounds like so much effort.

  2. A county map? Includes places I’ve just passed by: something approximate, since the map version here is kind of crazy

I may just do something from mapchart.net
